title: Add Author Section to README.md
description: Update the README.md file to include an author section with the relevant author information.
details: Open the project's README.md file. Add a clearly labeled 'Author' section near the end (or in a logical place, such as after the project description or before license information). Include the author's name and, if appropriate, contact information or a link to a profile (e.g., GitHub, email). Ensure the formatting matches the rest of the README and adheres to Markdown best practices.
test_strategy: Review the updated README.md file in a Markdown viewer to ensure the author section appears correctly formatted and contains accurate information. Optionally, have another team member review for clarity and consistency.
